podcasts.deleteEpisodeConfirmDescription: Deleting the episode removes its downloaded media from the server. Please confirm if you want to proceed.

roleDescriptions.admin: Can manage users, servers, settings, and more

roleDescriptions.comment: Can create and edit comments and ratings

library.title: Music library
library.description: Scan your library and view its status

downloads.title: Downloads & offline
downloads.description: Offline mode, downloads over Wi-Fi, downloads management

downloaders.title: Downloaders
downloaders.description: Add music to your server via Lidarr

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: Check for and install app updates

downloaders.description: Connect a downloader to add music that isn't on your server yet. It's fetched into your library and appears after the next scan.

lidarr.title: Lidarr
lidarr.description: Search and download albums through your Lidarr instance
lidarr.getApiKeyAction: Where do I find my API key?
lidarr.apiKeyHelpStep1: Open Lidarr in a web browser. It usually runs at http://<ip-address>:8686.
lidarr.apiKeyHelpStep3: Scroll to the Security section and copy the API Key value.
lidarr.connectionFailed: Couldn't connect. Check the URL and API key.
lidarr.autoScanDescription: Rescan your server when a download finishes so new albums show up automatically

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Search for artists and albums to add
discovery.emptyPrompt: Search for an artist or album to add to your library.
discovery.filtersDescription: These apply when you add an album to Lidarr.

album.addedMessage: Added to Lidarr. Searching for a release…
album.noRootFolder: No Lidarr root folder is configured.

release.title: Choose a release
release.description: Pick a specific release to download.
release.grabbedMessage: Release sent to your download client.

offlineSettings.title: Offline mode
offlineSettings.offlineModeDescription: Download favorite tracks for offline listening
offlineSettings.clearDownloadsDescription: Remove all downloaded tracks from device
offlineSettings.clearDownloadsConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete all downloaded tracks?
offlineSettings.clearDownloadsConfirmDescription: Deleting these is irreversible. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
offlineSettings.manageDownloadsDescription: View downloaded tracks and free up space
offlineSettings.downloadsWifiOnlyDescription: Pause the download queue when on cellular. Resumes automatically when Wi-Fi returns.
offlineSettings.autoSignOutDescription: Automatically sign out when your server can't be reached but the internet is working. Turn off to stay signed in and keep browsing downloaded tracks.
offlineSettings.pendingChangesDescription_one: {{count}} change made offline waiting to sync
offlineSettings.pendingChangesDescription_other: {{count}} changes made offline waiting to sync
offlineSettings.extendedOfflineDescription: Progressively download everything on this server so the whole library stays browsable and playable offline
offlineSettings.extendedOfflinePausedDisk: Paused — device storage is almost full
offlineSettings.extendedOfflineCompletedToast: Your library is fully cached — {{count}} tracks available offline
offlineSettings.extendedOfflineUnsupported: This server doesn't support full library sync
offlineSettings.extendedOfflineDisableConfirmDescription: Tracks and covers cached by the library sync will be deleted from this device. Albums, playlists and tracks you saved for offline individually are kept.
offlineSettings.downloadFormatDescription: Format offline downloads are stored in. Original keeps the exact file from the server; other formats are transcoded to save space.

updatesSettings.title: Updates
updatesSettings.autoCheckDescription: Check for a new version on launch and let you know when one is available
updatesSettings.checkNowDescription: Look for a newer version now
updatesSettings.checkFailed: Couldn't check for updates. Check your connection and try again.

cacheSettings.label: Clear cache
cacheSettings.description: Remove cached library data. Downloaded tracks are kept. Content reloads when you're back online.
cacheSettings.confirmDescription: This clears cached library data for this server. Your downloaded tracks are not affected.

musicLibrarySettings.title: Music library settings
musicLibrarySettings.scanMusicLibraryDescription: Intitiates a rescan of the media libraries on your server
musicLibrarySettings.scanMusicLibraryErrorDescription: An error occurred while starting a scan
musicLibrarySettings.scanMusicLibraryAdminRequiredDescription: Starting a scan requires administrator rights on your server
musicLibrarySettings.scanStatusDescription: Indicates the scan status of your music library

displaySettings.title: Display settings
displaySettings.languageDescription: Set your default language for the Wavio app
displaySettings.createTabDescription: Show the 'create' tab in the bottom tab bar
displaySettings.showEmptyHomeSectionsDescription: Show home sections that have no content instead of hiding them
displaySettings.homeSectionsDescription: Choose which sections appear on the home screen
displaySettings.homeSectionsSheetDescription: Turn sections off to hide them from the home screen
displaySettings.lyricsSourceDescription: Choose where synced lyrics come from, or turn them off.
displaySettings.lyricsKeepScreenOnDescription: Stop the screen from dimming while the lyrics screen is open and a track is playing. Uses more battery.
displaySettings.swipeActionDescription: Action triggered when swiping a track to the right in a list

hapticsSettings.title: Haptics
hapticsSettings.enabledDescription: Vibrate on interactions like scrolling the alphabet index

internetRadioStationsSettings.title: Internet radio stations
internetRadioStationsSettings.enabledDescription: Browse and search millions of stations from the Radio Browser directory. Turn off to only use your server's stations.
internetRadioStationsSettings.countryDescription: Pick the country for the 'By country' stations row. Defaults to your device's region.
internetRadioStationsSettings.tagsDescription: Choose which genre rows appear on the radio stations screen.

playbackSettings.title: Playback
playbackSettings.endlessPlaybackDescription: When the queue ends, automatically add similar tracks to keep the music playing.
playbackSettings.equalizerDescription: Open the system equalizer to tune the sound for the current playback session.
playbackSettings.equalizerErrorMessage: No system equalizer is available on this device.
playbackSettings.queueSyncDescription: Save your play queue on the server so you can pick it up on another device.

server.label: Prioritize server
server.description: On launch, restore the queue saved on the server. Your queue is also uploaded so other devices can pick it up.

local.label: Prioritize this device
local.description: On launch, keep this device's queue. It's still uploaded so your other devices can restore it.

off.label: Off
off.description: Don't sync. Your queue stays on this device only and is never sent to the server.

streamingSettings.title: Streaming settings
streamingSettings.audioQualityDescription: Limit the maximum bitrate used when streaming. Lower values save bandwidth, higher values improve quality.
streamingSettings.cellularAudioQualityDescription: Cap the bitrate when on cellular to save data. The lower of this and the Wi-Fi cap is used.
streamingSettings.streamingFormatDescription: Ask the server to transcode streams to this format. Keep Original for bit-perfect playback; pick a format if some files won't play (e.g. ALAC).
streamingSettings.replayGainDescription: Use ReplayGain tags to even out loudness across tracks.
streamingSettings.replayGainPreampDescription: Boost or cut overall volume in dB. Useful if normalized tracks feel too quiet.

contentSettings.title: Content settings
contentSettings.recentSearchesConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your stored recent searches?
contentSettings.recentSearchesConfirmDescription: Deleting these is irreversible. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
contentSettings.recentPlaysDescription: Delete your recent plays shortcuts on the top of the home screen
contentSettings.recentPlaysConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your stored recent play shortcuts?
contentSettings.recentPlaysConfirmDescription: Deleting these is irreversible. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
contentSettings.activityDescription: Delete your activity history of played albums, artists and playlists
contentSettings.activityConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your activity history?
contentSettings.activityConfirmDescription: Deleting this is irreversible. Please confirm if you want to proceed.

backupSettings.title: Backup & restore
backupSettings.exportDescription: Save your servers, preferences and library data as a single file you can share or move to another device.
backupSettings.restoreDescription: Replace all servers, preferences and library data with the contents of a backup file. Downloaded audio files are not restored.
backupSettings.restoreConfirmDescription: Restoring will erase your current servers, preferences and library data and replace them with the backup. This cannot be undone.
backupSettings.restoreInvalidFileMessage: The selected file is not a valid Wavio backup
backupSettings.restartRequiredDescription: Your data has been restored. Sign in to your server to finish.

securitySettings.title: Security
securitySettings.trustedCertificatesDescription: Self-signed server certificates you've chosen to trust on this device.
securitySettings.emptyHint: When you connect to a server with a self-signed certificate, you can choose to trust it. Trusted certificates appear here.
securitySettings.removeConfirmDescription: Connections to {{hostname}} will be rejected again until you trust its certificate anew.
securitySettings.clearAllConfirmDescription: Every server with a self-signed certificate will need to be trusted again.

podcastSettings.title: Podcasts
podcastSettings.configurePodcastsDescription: Configure your podcasts to stream from the app
podcastSettings.configurePodcastsErrorMessage: An error occurred while configuring the podcasts
podcastSettings.podcastConfigFormDescription: Enter your user ID and API key to configure your podcasts
podcastSettings.apiStatusDescription: Indicates the API status of your podcasts
podcastSettings.removePodcastConfigConfirmDescription: Removing podcast configuration will remove access to your podcasts. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
podcastSettings.getApiKeyDescription: Sign up on taddy.org to get the user ID and API key needed to configure podcasts.

internetRadioStations.newErrorMessage: An error occurred while creating the internet radio station
internetRadioStations.deleteInternetRadioStationErrorMessage: An error occurred while deleting the internet radio station.
internetRadioStations.deleteInternetRadioStationConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this interne radio station?
internetRadioStations.deleteInternetRadioStationConfirmDescrip: Deleting the internet radio station will remove it permanently. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
internetRadioStations.editInternetRadioStationSuccessMessage: Internet radio station has been successfully updated.
internetRadioStations.editInternetRadioStationErrorMessage: An error occurred while updating the internet radio station.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty: Nothing here yet. Albums, artists and playlists you play will show up here.

pendingChanges.title: Pending changes
pendingChanges.autoSyncHint: Synced automatically when your server is reachable again
pendingChanges.clearConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to discard all pending changes?
pendingChanges.clearConfirmDescription: These changes will never be sent to your server. This cannot be undone.

queue.title: Queue
queue.clearConfirmMessage: All tracks will be removed from the queue and playback will stop.
queue.clearHistoryConfirmMessage: All recently played tracks will be removed from this list. Your queue and playback are unaffected.
queue.createPlaylistErrorMessage: An error occurred while creating the playlist

player.title: Playing now
player.lyricsUnavailable: No lyrics available for this track.
player.jukeboxErrorMessage: Could not connect to the server's jukebox. Check your permissions.
player.jukeboxResumeMessage: A jukebox session is still playing on the server. Resume control or play on this device?

shares.title: Shares
shares.editShareErrorMessage: An error occurred while updating the share
shares.deleteShareErrorMessage: An error occurred while deleting the share
shares.deleteShareConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this share?
shares.deleteShareConfirmDescription: Deleting the share will remove it permanently and will prevent others from accessing the shared sounds. Please confirm if you want to proceed.

servers.title: Servers
servers.deleteServerConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete this server?
servers.deleteServerConfirmDescription: Deleting the server will remove it permanently. Please confirm if you want to proceed.
servers.deleteCurrentServerConfirmWarning: This is the server you're currently connected to. Deleting it will disconnect you.
servers.noUsers: No users yet for this server.
servers.switchServerConfirmDescription: You will be logged out and redirected to the sign-in screen.

update.title: Update available (v{{version}})
update.description: A new version of Wavio is available. Update now to get the latest features and fixes.
update.errorDescription: The update couldn't be downloaded. Check your connection and try again, or download it from the releases page.

shared.fallbackUrlHelp: Used when the main URL can't be reached. Must point to the same server.

offline.saveErrorMessage: An error occurred while saving for offline listening
offline.removeErrorMessage: An error occurred while removing offline downloads

shared.rateErrorMessage: An error occurred while setting the rating
shared.shareUrlErrorMessage: An error occurred while copying the share url to the clipboard

localLibrary.unsupported: The local library doesn't support this operation

serverSwitch.title: Switching server
serverSwitch.subtitle: Signing you in…
serverSwitch.errorDescription: We couldn't sign in with your saved credentials. They may have changed on the server.

login.title: Sign in
login.loginErrorMessage: Couldn't reach the requested server. Try again after verifying your server informations
login.localFoldersHelp: Add one or more folders on this device to scan for music.
login.localNoPaths: Add at least one folder to continue
login.localSetupHelp: How does the local library work?
login.localInfoFormats: Wavio scans the folders you select for MP3, FLAC, M4A, AAC, ALAC, OGG, Opus, WAV, WMA and AIFF files.
login.localInfoMetadata: Title, artist, album, track number, cover art and more are read from each file's embedded tags. Untagged files fall back to their filename, so well-tagged files give the best results.
login.localInfoTagging: For a clean, consistent library we recommend tagging your files with MusicBrainz Picard before adding them.

certificateTrust.title: Untrusted certificate
certificateTrust.intro: This server uses a certificate that isn't trusted by your device (typically self-signed). Review it below and choose whether to trust it.
certificateTrust.subject: Subject
certificateTrust.warning: Only trust this certificate if you recognize this server. Trusting an unknown certificate can expose your traffic.

clientCertificate.label: Client certificate (mTLS)
clientCertificate.hint: Authenticate to servers that require mutual TLS. Pick a certificate from your device's keystore — install one first in Android Settings → Security → Encryption & credentials.
clientCertificate.unavailable: Client certificate selection needs a native rebuild of the app to become available.
clientCertificate.noneMessage: If you haven't installed a client certificate yet, add one in Android Settings → Security → Encryption & credentials, then try again.

errorCodes.20: Incompatible Subsonic REST protocol version. Client must upgrade.
errorCodes.30: Incompatible Subsonic REST protocol version. Server must upgrade.
errorCodes.41: Token authentication not supported for LDAP users.
errorCodes.50: User is not authorized for the given operation.
errorCodes.60: The trial period for the Subsonic server is over. Please upgrade to Subsonic Premium. Visit subsonic.org for details.
errorCodes.70: The requested data was not found.

errorCodes.API_KEY_INVALID: The API Key or User ID you are using in your headers is invalid.
errorCodes.API_RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: You have exceeded your monthly quota of API requests.
errorCodes.INVALID_QUERY_OR_SYNTAX: Your query is too complex or there is a spelling or syntax mistake somewhere in your query. Use the message value as a hint as to what can be fixed.
errorCodes.BAD_USER_INPUT: One of the arguments you are passing in is invalid. Use the message value to get more details on what is invalid.
errorCodes.QUERY_TOO_COMPLEX: The query you are passing in is too complex. Please simplify your query (by removing items from your query)
errorCodes.REQUIRES_USER_AUTHENTICATION: You need to be be logged in to make that request.
errorCodes.ACCESS_NOT_ALLOWED: You are not allowed to access this query or mutation.
errorCodes.TADDY_SERVER_ERROR: Something is wrong on our end. We have systems in place to monitor this but also feel free to reach out to danny@taddy.org if you are getting this error.
